name: ALLIANCE RESOURCE PARTNERS LP
summary: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. (ARLP) is a diversified energy company primarily engaged in coal mining operations through its subsidiary Alliance Coal, LLC. It produces bituminous coal for electricity generation and steel production, and holds oil & gas mineral interests through Alliance Minerals, LLC. ARLP also operates coal minerals interests via Alliance Resource Properties and has other growth investments including technology subsidiaries under the Matrix Group.

products.name: Bituminous Coal
products.description: Coal used primarily to generate electricity and to make coke for the steel industry, with heat value ranging between 10,500 and 15,500 Btus per pound.

products.name: Metallurgical Coal
products.description: Coal primarily used in the production of steel.

products.name: Oil & Gas Mineral Interests
products.description: Royalty and mineral interests in oil and gas properties held through Alliance Minerals, LLC and subsidiaries.

products.name: Matrix Group Technology Products
products.description: Technology products and services provided through Alliance Design, ASI, and Matrix Design subsidiaries.

partnerships.description: ARLP has an investment relationship with Ascend Elements, Inc.
ARLP has an investment relationship with Infinitum Electric, Inc.
ARLP has an investment relationship with Gavin Generation.
ARLP has an investment relationship with Francis Renewable Energy.
ARLP has a relationship with Bluegrass Minerals Management.
CSX referenced as a transportation partner for coal operations.
